title: Carry Mobs
description: Allows players to store and place back living mobs using inventory items.
body:
CarryMobs is a lightweight and intuitive Minecraft plugin that allows players to store any mob directly into their inventory and place it back later, using simple sneak-based interactions.

Designed for Paper/Spigot 1.21+, this plugin works seamlessly with all living mobs and does not require commands or GUIs.

✨ Features

📦 Pick up any mob

Sneak (crouch) + Right-Click a mob to store it as an item

📤 Place mobs back

Sneak + Left-Click while holding the mob item to spawn it again

🧠 Mob data preserved

Health

Custom name

Potion effects

Baby/adult state

Villager profession & level (if applicable)

🌍 Works with all LivingEntity mobs

🚫 No duplication bugs

🧩 No commands, no GUI — simple and clean

⚙️ Uses modern PersistentDataContainer (no NMS)

🚀 Optimized for Paper 1.21+

🕹️ How to Use

Sneak + Right-Click a mob → mob is converted into an inventory item

Hold the mob item

Sneak + Left-Click a block or air → mob is placed back into the world

That’s it. No setup required.

📦 Requirements

Minecraft 1.21 or newer

Paper / Spigot

Java 21

⚠️ Notes

Only works while sneaking (to prevent accidental usage)

Creative & spectator edge cases are safely handled

Corrupted or invalid mob items are ignored to prevent crashes

💡 Ideal For

Survival servers

SMPs

Event servers

Mob transportation without leads or minecarts

Clean alternatives to mob stacking plugins

🔧 Planned / Optional Features

Permissions support

Configurable cooldowns

Mob stacking into single items
